chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P. No.D-386 of 2018 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE For orders on office objection. For orders on MA No.1961/2018. For hearing of main case. 17.02.2025 None present for the petitioner nor intimation received. This petition was filed in the year 2018 and it came up in Court lastly on 24.07.2019 and thereafter this petition is pending without any progress. Even the petitioner has not attempted to fix the matter in Court. It shows that the petitioner has no interest in the proceedings. Consequently, instant petition is dismissed for non-prosecution along with listed application. JUDGE JUDGE *Abdullah Channa/PS*
